text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and the school store is crammed
full of students. Matikanetannhauser is at the
very end of the line.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...I shall impart a divine message from the great
Shiraoki. Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gulp! Y-yes?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, like most days, shall bring you a frenzy of
great fortune! Lunch time portends particularly
good luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wowieee! So you're saying I'll finally be able to
get my hands on the bread that always sells out?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Melon bread, cream buns, carrot bread. ♪
Bready, bready, breaaad!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, everyone! The melon bread, cream buns,
and carrot bread are all sold out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But I'm supposed to have great fortune
today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's so strange... Could I have made a
mistake in my divination?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No, no, it's fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It must mean my great fortune isn't related to
bread!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Off to the cafe, where my lucky break awaits! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, I'm coming too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with curiosity, I decide to follow the
two of them.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! Take a look at this signboard!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"New menu item: Stewed Carrot Hamburger
Steak!" And it's limited to only ten customers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This has to be it! It's your destiny to acquire this
rare lunch today, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them line up and wait for their turn to
order. But...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but the Stewed Carrot Hamburger Steak
is all sold out.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! You're sold out too?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaah?! Wh-what's going on?! How could the
great Shiraoki's divination mislead us not just
once, but twice?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can practically see the good luck awaiting us!
This is so very strange!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... You saw all that, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, being one step away and still missing out is
so like me... Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Buuut...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Lunch time isn't over yet! The bread and new
hamburger steak were sold out, but there must be
an even luckier lunch waiting for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aha! That's it! I get it now! The key is your
unbreakable spirit!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You brave any headwind—that's why my divination said you've got a super dose of luck coming your way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Fuku! There's no doubt in my mind
that I'll get my hands on an ultra-rare lunch!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The only question is, where am I gonna find it?
Muuun...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Where do you think my ultra-rare lunch is hiding,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let's march right back to the school shop!
Let's wait patiently for fortune to come to us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see. Going back to the beginning. That might
just work!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! The divine message did say the good
omen was at the school store, after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aww, everything's sold out. Where's my ultra-rare
lunch?

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, perfect timing! We just got a batch of all-new
products in. Would you like to try a sample?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Let's see here... "Supreme Grape Bread"?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! I can smell the fruity aroma from here!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser & Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the sample! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and Matikanefukukitaru dig
into the delicious new bread with relish!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see. So if I just stay as I am now, the fortune will
come to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to perform a prayer to invite even
greater fortune! Ommmmm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yummy yummy lunch! Chewy chewy munch!
Kiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you two. Have you still not had any
lunch?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's right. We're suuuper hungry.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
You can have my lunch, if you'd like. I did so
much taste-testing while I was working that I can't
eat another bite.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Spring rolls, hamburger steak, oden...
There's so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The cafe lady's personal lunch is bound to be
delicious! This must be what the divine message
was referring to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and Matikanefukukitaru
enjoy the ultra-rare lunch together!
